name: searxng-search
description: Self-hosted, no-key web search via a SearXNG meta-search instance. Point it at your own SearXNG URL for private, free web search and links.
author: PersonalClaw

x-meta.label: SearXNG Endpoint
x-meta.help: Base URL of your SearXNG instance (e.g. https://searxng.example.com). The JSON API must be enabled.

x-meta.label: Request Timeout
x-meta.help: Maximum seconds to wait for a search response.
